title: Permanent Employment Certification (PERM) Online Filing Release Notes 10/30/2024 | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## Permanent Employment Certification (PERM) Online Filing Release Notes 10/30/2024
- For 9089 PERM applications, application warnings will be summarized for review on the submission page.
- For 9089 PERM applications, after clicking the submit button a new pop-up will request confirmation of the submission.
